title: 10 Days Estonia
subTitle: Italian lovers in an Estonian winter are the recipe for an offbeat fairy tale. Experience all the adventures that Estonia's national parks offer.

title: City Breaks
subTitle: The host travels through Prague exploring the culture rich city with its picturesque castles, Czech beers and enchanting segway rides.

title: Backpack
subTitle: Before going jet skiing at Playa del Durque, the host visits Los Gigantes town and the Pyramids of Guimar, where they sample paella and take in the starry sky atop El Teide.

title: Off the Grid
subTitle: Lakshadweep offers the travellers warm blue waters, a secluded feel and an unobstructed ocean view. Meanwhile, Alex goes scuba diving in Bangaram.

title: City Breaks
subTitle: The host travels through Prague exploring the culture rich city with its picturesque castles, Czech beers and enchanting segway rides.

title: The savvy nomad philippines
subTitle: Seasoned explorer Emeline takes a peek into the natural beauty of the Philippines through the mesmerising sceneries of Bohol.

title: Unwind
subTitle: The host visits Haridwar and explores the many different features of the city for a relaxing time that is unknown to travellers.

title: City Breaks
subTitle: Revealing the rich history and culture of cities beyond the popular sights. This time, a look at Bengaluru, the capital and largest city found in the southern Indian state of Karnataka.

title: Backpack
subTitle: A solitary traveller visits exotic destinations around the world and explores their major landmarks and cultural diversity.

subTitle: The host visits the picturesque coral island of Kadmat and goes beyond its scenic vistas while enjoying deep-sea fishing.

subTitle: Revealing the rich history and culture of cities beyond the popular sights. This time, a look at Bengaluru, the capital and largest city found in the southern Indian state of Karnataka.

title: The Savvy Nomad
subTitle: In the last leg of her exciting journey, Emeline ventures into the captivating realm of Coron with its mesmerizing lagoons.

title: Unwind
subTitle: Sabrina, the host, explores Dubai's old charm by travelling through canals, visiting souks, perfume shops and takes a trip to Wild Wadi Water Park.

subTitle: The host visits the picturesque coral island of Kadmat and goes beyond its scenic vistas while enjoying deep-sea fishing.

title: Heritage
subTitle: The host sheds light on the Stonehenge, a prehistoric upright monumental structure in England, whilst highlighting its historical significance.

title: Landmarks
subTitle: The host explores Royal Springs, a travel destination in Jammu and Kashmir that is an exercise in class and sophistication.

title: Off the Grid
subTitle: Alex sets off to Minicoy in Lakshadweep where he learns to race in a traditional boat, gains knowledge about its making and its fine craftsmanship.

title: Bliss
subTitle: The host travels to Himandhoo and enjoys the exciting experiences of snorkelling, shark feeding, wine tasting and kayaking.

title: Best From the Rest
subTitle: India is a country with rich heritage, culture and history. Five best museums in India are showcased to the audience in order to shed light on the country's glory.
